hero.label: Luxury Residences
hero.title: Pranvera
hero.subtitle: Where architecture meets aspiration. 10 floors of premium residences above the city.

about.label: Our Vision
about.quote: Architecture is the art of how to waste space.
about.title: Where Architecture Meets
about.body: Pranvera Tower redefines urban living in the heart of the city. With 10 floors of meticulously designed residences and over 20 ground-floor commercial spaces, this landmark development offers an unparalleled lifestyle.

1br.title: One Bedroom
1br.description: Elegant single-bedroom residences designed for modern professionals. Floor-to-ceiling windows, premium finishes, and open-plan living spaces.

2br.title: Two Bedroom
2br.description: Spacious family residences with generous living areas. Two full bedrooms, modern kitchens, and panoramic city views from upper floors.

3br.title: Three Bedroom
3br.description: Premium family apartments spanning over 130 square meters. Designed for those who refuse to compromise on space, comfort, or elegance.

penthouse.title: Penthouse
penthouse.description: The crown jewel of Pranvera Tower. Sprawling rooftop residences with 360° city views, private terraces, and bespoke interior finishes.

commercial.title: Commercial Spaces
commercial.description: Premium ground-floor and first-floor commercial units available for lease. High footfall, main road frontage, and flexible layouts for retail or office use.

form.name: Full Name
form.success: Thank you. We will be in touch shortly.

inquiry.title: Request Information
inquiry.subtitle: Our team will contact you within 24 hours.
